case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GABRIELA PAOLA FAUSTO MASCORRO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $727.98 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MASCORRO, GABRIELA PAOLA FAUSTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAY-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASCORRO, GABRIELA PAOLA FAUSTO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, ENNY CUDNY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GABRIELA PAOLA FAUSTO MASCORRO. PROOF OF SERVCIE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
